all.en: Two months ago, I joined a local running club to prepare for my first full marathon.
all.zh: 兩個月前，我加入了一個在地的跑步社團，為我的第一場全程馬拉松做準備。

all.en: The club meets every Tuesday evening and Saturday morning at the riverside park.
all.zh: 這個社團每週二晚上和週六早上在河濱公園集合。

all.en: Our head coach is a retired athlete who has completed over thirty marathons worldwide.
all.zh: 我們的總教練是一位退休的運動員，已在世界各地完成了三十多場馬拉松。

all.en: During my first session, I could barely keep up with the beginner pace group.
all.zh: 在我的第一次練跑時，我幾乎無法跟上初學者配速團體的腳步。

all.en: My legs felt like heavy stones, and my breathing was loud and uneven.
all.zh: 我的雙腿沉重得像石頭，呼吸又大聲又不規律。

all.en: The coach reminded me that endurance is built slowly through weeks of consistent effort.
all.zh: 教練提醒我，耐力是透過數週的持續努力慢慢建立起來的。

all.en: Gradually, I started to enjoy the long runs through quiet streets at sunrise.
all.zh: 漸漸地，我開始享受日出時分穿越寧靜街道的長跑。

all.en: My fellow runners shared tips on nutrition, proper shoes and recovery techniques.
all.zh: 跑友們分享了關於營養、合適鞋款和恢復技巧的建議。

all.en: Last weekend, I successfully completed a twenty-kilometer training run without stopping.
all.zh: 上個週末，我成功完成了二十公里的訓練跑，中途沒有停下來。

all.en: My resting heart rate has dropped significantly, and my sleep quality has greatly improved.
all.zh: 我的靜止心率明顯下降，睡眠品質也大幅提升。

all.en: The official marathon takes place in November, and I feel more confident every week.
all.zh: 正式的馬拉松比賽將在十一月舉行，我每週都感覺更有自信。

all.en: Joining this club has changed my view on what my body is truly capable of.
all.zh: 加入這個社團改變了我對自己身體真正能力的看法。
